season_count.notes: Season I rounds 1-5; Season II 6-10; Season III 11-15.

warehouse_cap_per_resource.notes: Applies unless a rule explicitly changes the cap.

starting_warehouse_resources_by_player_c.notes: Starting Warehouse resources per resource type.

encounter_pool_per_player.notes: Build balanced pool before hands and deck.

standard_deck_cards_per_player.notes: Initial Encounter Deck before Golden Boon.

golden_boons_per_game.notes: Added to Encounter Deck; not dealt to hands.

reveal_standard_cards_per_round.notes: Golden Boon is extra reveal and does not count.

arrival_start_timer_tokens.notes: Active Arrival starts with 3 timer tokens.

final_strain_penalty_renown.notes: Per Strain token on the board.

river_hex_default_placement.notes: No tile may be placed on a River hex unless that tile explicitly permits River placement.

bridge_river_placement.notes: Bridge is the typical tile placed on River hexes and is a Travel Tile.

river_crossing_without_bridge_action_cos.notes: Crossing the river without a Bridge connection costs 1 Action.

river_adjacency.notes: Docks and Washhouse/Bathhouse use river-adjacent placement.
